aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data and conversational content, but improvements can significantly boost visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries and solutions.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or visible, severely impacting local search presence.
critical_issues: GBP is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI.
Lack of photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any future discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and emergency repair requests.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expert tips, and media presence to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Kansas City.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: GBP invisibility and lack of structured data mean AI assistants can't find or recommend your services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances your site's structured data, creates conversational content, and optimizes GBP to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential customers—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Search?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your NAP consistency is excellent, your AI readiness needs improvement to capture more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your local search presence.
